imageGen.style: Vintage newspaper engraving illustration, 1920s editorial style. Soft ink wash with fine cross-hatching and midtones — not harsh contrast, not pure black and white. Aged newsprint feel, warm gray tones, gentle shading. Clean readable composition with one clear focal subject. NO text, words, labels, letters, numbers, or signs anywhere. NO psychedelic patterns, NO tangled cables, NO decorative swirls. Simple subject, editorial mood. Subject:

knownIncidents: A pgMustard API key was leaked into a GitHub PR comment when an AI agent posted testing output as part of testing the new \explain share pgmustard feature in rpg v0.8.0. The key was quickly spotted by @NikolayS and rotated. Write this as a short SECURITY article with dry wit — cautionary tale, not catastrophe.
